lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, one is emancipated. ||2||
All the deeds done in egotism,
Without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness.
are just chains around the neck.
who has such destiny written on his forehead. ||3||
is just like placing chains around one's ankles.
He alone meets with the Guru, and realizes the One Lord,
Harboring self-conceit and self-interest
He alone is deluded, who is deluded by God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: so miliaa ji har man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: He alone meets the Lord, who is pleasing to His Mind.
No one, by himself, is ignorant or wise.
He alone chants the Naam, whom the Lord inspires to do so.
Servant Nanak is forever a sacrifice to You. ||4||1||17||
You have no end or limitation.
The false world is engrossed in greed.
Maya, the enticer, has enticed the world of the three gunas, the three qualities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਸੰਚੀ ਅੰਤ ਕੀ ਬਾਰ ਸਗਲ ਲੇ ਛਲੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: meree meree kar kai sanchee ant kee baar sagal le chhaleea |1|
lines.english: Crying out, "Mine, mine!" they collect possessions, but in the end, they are all deceived. ||1||
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:
He is the Cherisher of all beings and creatures. ||1||Pause||
The Lord is fearless, formless and merciful.
Some collect wealth, and bury it in the ground.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੁ ਕਮਾਇ ਕਰੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਥੈਲੀ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਚੰਚਲਿ ਚਲੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raaj kamaae karee jin thailee taa kai sang na chanchal chaleea |2|
lines.english: The king exercises his power, and fills his money-bags, but this fickle companion will not go along with him. ||2||
Some cannot abandon wealth, even in their dreams.
Some love this wealth even more than their body and breath of life.
Some collect it, forsaking their fathers and mothers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤ ਮੀਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਤੇ ਗੁਹਜੀ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਖਲੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sut meet bhraat te guhajee taa kai nikatt na hoee khaleea |3|
lines.english: Some hide it from their children, friends and siblings, but it will not remain with them. ||3||
Some become hermits, and sit in meditative trances.
Some are Yogis, celibates, religious scholars and thinkers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਮੜੀ ਮਸਾਣੀ ਬਨ ਮਹਿ ਬਸਤੇ ਊਠਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੈ ਲਾਗੀ ਪਲੀਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: grihi marree masaanee ban meh basate aootth tinaa kai laagee paleea |4|
lines.english: Some dwell in homes, graveyards, cremation grounds and forests; but Maya still clings to them there. ||4||
When the Lord and Master releases one from his bonds,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਸਿਓ ਜੀਅ ਤਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam basio jeea taa kai |
lines.english: the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, comes to dwell in his soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਭਏ ਜਨ ਮੁਕਤੇ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਲੀਆ ॥੫॥੨॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: saadhasang bhe jan mukate gat paaee naanak nadar nihaleea |5|2|18|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, His humble servants are liberated; O Nanak, they are redeemed and enraptured by the Lord's Glance of Grace. ||5||2||18||
Meditate in remembrance on the One Immaculate Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੇ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਤ ਨ ਕੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: jaa te birathaa jaat na koaoo |
lines.english: No one is turned away from Him empty-handed.
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:
Each and every instant, meditate on that Creator Lord.
He blessed you with body and soul, and embellished you.
He cherished and preserved you in your mother's womb;
Enshrine the Lord's lotus feet deep within the nucleus of your self.
Meditating in remembrance on Him, all faults and mistakes are covered.
Save your soul from the waters of corruption.
Your cries and shrieks shall be ended;
meditating on the Lord of the Universe, your doubts and fears shall be dispelled.
Rare is that being, who finds the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kai bal bal jaae |1|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice, a sacrifice to Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo simarai tis kaa nisataaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whoever meditates on Him is emancipated. ||1||Pause||
The Lord's Name is the support of my mind and body.
The ignorant fool falls in love with it.
He believes that the false thing is true.
He is intoxicated with the wine of sexual desire, anger and greed;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਦ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mad man tan sang jaataa |
lines.english: His mind and body are permeated with the intoxication of Maya.
he loses this human life in exchance for a mere shell.
He abandons his own, and loves that of others.
He comes alone, and he goes alone.
His thirsty desires are not quenched, although he indulges in pleasures.
His hopes are not fulfilled, and all his words are false.
